summary: Comprehensive backend (16 pytest cases) and frontend E2E testing of Unbiased AI Decision app. All backend APIs pass (auth, file upload, fairness analysis, Gemini 3 Flash AI explanation, list/detail/report). E2E flow works: register -> dashboard -> new audit -> upload CSV -> select gender/outcome/hired -> run audit -> severity HIGH banner, metrics grid, recharts chart, Gemini explanation rendered on /analyses/:id. Severity correctly computed as HIGH for 80% male / 20% female hiring dataset (DI=0.250, DPD=0.600).

issues: Recharts BarChart axes/grid/labels render but bar fills appear missing/invisible in chart canvas (data-testid metrics-grid + groups list still display correct values 80%/20%). Likely a fill/color CSS issue with Recharts <Bar> component.

action_items: Investigate Recharts <Bar> fill rendering on AnalysisDetail page — bars not visually drawn though axes/legend render.

Originally frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL was pointing to a different domain (https://bias-detector-22.preview.emergentagent.com) than the deployed app domain (cecf3fd2-...). This caused CORS failures (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * with credentials include). Testing agent updated frontend/.env to match deployed domain and restarted frontend. Main agent should verify this is the intended config going forward.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS uses single FRONTEND_URL env; if deployment host differs, all credentialed requests fail. Consider supporting comma-separated CORS_ORIGINS or regex for *.preview.emergentagent.com.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (auth_testing playbook expects 5-fail lockout) — not implemented.
Admin seed updates password if changed — good. JWT_SECRET present in .env — good.
compute_fairness severity thresholds are correct (80% rule), bcrypt hashes start with $2b$ — verified via login.
File upload size cap 20MB enforced in code — good. CSV-only filename check should also validate content-type ideally.
test_credentials: admin@unbias.ai/admin123 verified. tester@unbias.ai/test12345 verified. Created qa-<timestamp>@unbias.ai during E2E.
seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/hiring_qa.csv (20 rows, 80/20 male/female hired imbalance). Created QA users qa-<ts>@unbias.ai during register tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 16 tests). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. CORS depends on FRONTEND_URL env in backend/.env matching the actual deployment origin. Recharts bars rendering issue on AnalysisDetail is the only remaining UI item.
rca of the issue: CORS bug RCA: Browser blocked credentialed XHR because frontend (cecf3fd2-...) was calling backend at a different domain (bias-detector-22-...) whose CORS returned Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *. With axios withCredentials: include, wildcard origin is rejected by the browser. Fix: aligned REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to the same origin as the deployed frontend so /api routes via ingress on port 8001 — same-origin avoids CORS entirely. Reproduction: open /register on cecf3fd2 domain with the old .env, submit register form -> network panel shows 'CORS preflight failed wildcard with credentials' error and 'Something went wrong'. Mitigation applied: updated frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to https://cecf3fd2-15f3-413a-9cfd-37090be97bee.preview.emergentagent.com and restarted frontend supervisor.
